backend/main.mo: Defines core types, persistent state, and authorization helpers for predictions, subscriptions, referrals, and admin/creator access.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing affected frontend files, components, and test IDs for admin gating verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of many frontend files describing their purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global CSS defining color variables, dark mode values, and base styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that mounts the React app and loads main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures the TanStack router with all app routes and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/AccountProfileEd: Form component allowing users to edit and save their name and email via updateUserProfile.
frontend/src/components/AdminGate.tsx: Admin access wrapper that handles auth initialization, login prompting, and definitive admin checks before rendering or denying access.
frontend/src/components/AdminSupportCard: Provides an admin tool to look up a user's premium status by principal ID and display detailed source and timing info.
frontend/src/components/AppFooter.tsx: Renders the site footer with branding, navigation links, social icons, and a caffeine.ai referral link.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Displays the main navigation bar with auth-aware links, admin visibility checks, and a mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Wraps the app with header and footer and triggers a profile setup modal when an authenticated user lacks a profile.
frontend/src/components/DabbleFormatCard: Generates formatted text for Dabble bet entry based on a prediction and provides a copy-to-clipboard action.
frontend/src/components/HeroBranding.tsx: Shows the homepage hero section with logo, gradients, and marketing text about AI-powered predictions.
Displays a compact inline live score widget indicating status, team names, and scores.
frontend/src/components/LiveScorePanel.t: Shows a detailed live score card with loading, unavailable, or active game views including last-updated info.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Provides a login/logout button using Internet Identity, handling authentication state and errors.
frontend/src/components/ManualPremiumGra: Allows admins to manually grant or revoke premium access for a user by principal ID with validation and feedback.
frontend/src/components/PredictionsFilte: Renders sport and sort-order filters for predictions using selectable dropdowns.
frontend/src/components/PremiumGate.tsx: Restricts content to authenticated users with active premium access, showing loading, sign‑in, or subscribe UI as needed.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal for creating a basic user profile with name and optional email using a profile update hook.
frontend/src/components/RedeemReferralCo: Form to redeem referral codes for premium access with error mapping and success feedback.
frontend/src/components/ReferralCodesAdm: Admin panel to create, list, copy, and revoke referral codes with configurable duration.
frontend/src/components/ResponsibleGambl: Displays a disclaimer warning about betting risks and responsible gambling.
frontend/src/components/StripePaymentSet: Form for configuring Stripe secret key and allowed countries for subscription payments.
frontend/src/components/SubscribeCta.tsx: Displays a marketing CTA promoting premium predictions with a button navigating to pricing.
frontend/src/components/TermsAcceptanceG: Gates content behind a terms-of-service acceptance flow with stored acceptance state and navigation to full terms.
frontend/src/hooks/useActivateSubscripti: Provides a mutation to activate a subscription and refresh related cache queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: Provides admin checks and mutations for updating depth charts, injuries, coaching styles, news flags, and creating predictions.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminPremiumDiagno: Fetches admin-only premium status diagnostics for a specified principal with error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity auth context with login, logout, and identity loading logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useLiveScores.ts: Queries live scores and in-progress games with polling via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useManualPremiumGrant: Mutation to grant manual premium access and invalidate related caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useManualPremiumRevok: Mutation to revoke manual premium access and invalidate related caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Hooks for fetching predictions, including all predictions, by sport, or by ID using the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useReferralCodes.ts: Provides React Query hooks for listing, creating, revoking, and redeeming referral codes through the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRestorePremiumAcce: Defines a mutation that invalidates and refetches subscription and premium-related queries to refresh premium access state.
frontend/src/hooks/useStripeCheckout.ts: Implements hooks for creating Stripe checkout sessions, checking Stripe setup, and setting configuration via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscription.ts: Fetches subscription, profile, and premium source data and computes active access states using backend responses.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides hooks to fetch and update the caller's user profile with React Query caching.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and custom CSS variables for theming, light/dark modes, and utility color classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point initializing React, React Query, Internet Identity provider, and global styles.
frontend/src/pages/AccountPage.tsx: Renders the user account dashboard showing profile, subscription, premium status, and admin options with loading and auth handling.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin interface with tabs for Stripe setup, referral codes, premium grants, support tools, and various data‑entry admin mutations.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page displaying branding, feature highlights, and pricing teaser sections using cards and icons.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Shows a payment failure message with options to retry or return home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Handles subscription activation after successful payment, managing URL params, authentication, and activation states.
Displays detailed prediction info with live score matching, metadata, and premium/terms gating.
frontend/src/pages/PredictionsPage.tsx: Lists predictions with filtering, sorting, live score matching, and premium/terms gating.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Shows subscription plans and initiates Stripe checkout after validating auth, terms, and config.
frontend/src/pages/SendSupportPage.tsx: React page showing a Cash App cashtag with copy and external link buttons for manual support.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Terms of Service page with scrollable legal text and acceptance tracking via local storage.
frontend/src/utils/refetchIntervals.ts: Defines shared React Query refetch interval constants for predictions and live scores.
frontend/src/utils/riskTier.ts: Maps a prediction’s win probability to a risk tier object with labels, colors, and descriptions.
frontend/src/utils/termsAcceptance.ts: Handles reading, writing, and clearing terms-acceptance state in localStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading URL parameters, persisting them in sessionStorage, and clearing hash params.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, shadows, and plugins for the project.
project_state.json: Tracks the project’s schema, features, architecture notes, issues, and versioned state.
